chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2712 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ سَمَاعَةَ : «لَهَا اَلْمَهْرُ إِنْ كَانَ دَخَلَ بِهَا».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2712 - In the narration of Sama'ah: "She is entitled to the dowry if he had consummated the marriage with her."
